---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
updated: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-milestone-cross-cutting
key: sv0-toolchain-milestone-cross-cutting
state: draft
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - cross-cutting
  - macros
  - literate
  - std
  - packaging
title: "cross-cutting: macros, literate sources, std/concurrency, packaging"
type: task
roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
---

# cross-cutting work (spans multiple design milestones)

## purpose

track features in the [vision and design](http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html) that **do not map cleanly** to a single numbered milestone or that **start after bootstrap** is far enough along. this file is intentionally a **backlog + link hub**; split out child tasks when any stream becomes large.

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm

## streams (refine independently)

### A — hygienic macro system (design: post-bootstrap)

- declarative and procedural macros; procedural macros on **bytecode VM**
- parser reserves (`!`, hygiene rules) already documented in design — keep **sv0doc** and parser aligned
- **prerequisite**: stable AST, VM, parser (design lists all three)

/ai: when starting implementation, create `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-cross-cutting-macros.Rmd` with phased deliverables.

### B — literate `.sv0.md` tangling

- chunk names, `<<references>>`, error mapping to markdown line numbers
- integration with `sv0 doc` and doctests (`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`)

/ai: add grammar/spec updates under **sv0doc** before enabling in compiler by default.

### C — standard library depth

- **`core`**: complete vs design tier 1
- **`std`**: allocator, I/O, collections, **networking**
- **concurrency**: `std::thread`, channels, `Mutex`, `Arc`, atomics (design ties to milestone 3+)
- **`crypto`**: overlaps **milestone 5**; link deliverables to avoid duplication

### D — package registry and ecosystem

- design mentions a **future** registry — track feasibility, naming, and versioning here until it becomes its own milestone file

### E — quantum simulator and other research use cases

- aspirational in design goals; no numbered milestone — use this section or a dedicated task if work begins

## refinement log

- 2026-03-25: initial scaffold; streams A–E from design “macro system”, literate section, std vision, future registry, and goals list.

## related

- `task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`
- `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd` — macros often follow self-host stability
- `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-5-llvm-crypto.Rmd` — crypto std overlap
